context: Tests whether the agent builds a REST BFF using Fastify with correct resilience patterns: Promise.allSettled for parallel calls, graceful fallbacks for non-critical services, JWT RS256 auth on protected routes, RateLimiterRedis with correct config, and @fastify/caching for response caching.

checklist.name: Fastify framework
checklist.description: Uses Fastify as the HTTP framework (imports from 'fastify', not express, hapi, koa, or other frameworks)

checklist.name: Promise.allSettled for parallel calls
checklist.description: Uses Promise.allSettled (not Promise.all or sequential awaits) to call multiple upstream services in parallel on the PDP endpoint

checklist.name: Graceful inventory fallback
checklist.description: When inventory service fails/rejects, returns a fallback object with `available: true` and `quantity: null` instead of erroring

checklist.name: Graceful CMS fallback
checklist.description: When CMS/content service fails/rejects, returns null (not an error) for the content field

checklist.name: Auth on cart route only
checklist.description: Authentication middleware is applied via preHandler on the cart route (not globally to all routes, not missing from cart)

checklist.name: RS256 JWT algorithm
checklist.description: JWT verification specifies RS256 algorithm (e.g. `algorithms: ['RS256']` in the verify options), not HS256 or omitted

checklist.name: RateLimiterRedis package
checklist.description: Rate limiting uses RateLimiterRedis from the 'rate-limiter-flexible' package (not express-rate-limit, fastify-rate-limit, or custom logic)

checklist.name: Rate limiter config values
checklist.description: RateLimiterRedis is configured with keyPrefix 'rl_gateway', points: 100, duration: 60, and blockDuration: 60

checklist.name: Rate limit key strategy
checklist.description: Rate limit key uses `request.user?.id ?? request.ip` (user ID for authenticated requests, IP for anonymous)

checklist.name: Retry-After header on 429
checklist.description: When rate limit is exceeded, sets `Retry-After: 60` header before responding with 429

checklist.name: @fastify/caching plugin
checklist.description: Uses @fastify/caching plugin (not a custom cache or different caching library) registered via app.register()

checklist.name: Caching config: PUBLIC privacy
checklist.description: @fastify/caching is configured with privacy set to PUBLIC (fastifyCaching.privacy.PUBLIC or equivalent string)

checklist.name: Fastify logger enabled
checklist.description: Fastify is instantiated with logger: true (not false or omitted)
